sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113419" key="xarkwmata=s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαρκ-ωματᾶς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾶδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n113419.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">χαλκωματουργός</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Schwyzer App.II.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.2</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Lydia</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
